name: Affin Duo+ Visa & Mastercard Credit Cards
description:
The Affin Duo+ Visa Credit Card is ideal for Malaysians who uses contactless transactions regularly.

The Affin Duo+ Mastercard Credit Card is ideal for Malaysians who prefer collecting rewards points instead of cashback, and mostly spend on travelling.

rows.condition: Previous balance of RM8000 and above

rows.category: Airlines, E-Commerce/Online, Duty Free Shops, Hotels, Overseas Transactions (Mastercard Only)

highlights: [Visa Only] Cashback capped at RM100 per month if previous balance is RM8000 and above
[Visa Only] Cashback capped at RM50 per month if previous balance is below RM8000
[Mastercard Only] 3X AFFIN Rewards Points on Airlines, E-Commerce/Online, Duty Free Shops, Hotels, Overseas Transactions
[Visa & Mastercard] Make 12 transactions per year to waive annual fees
